segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: So, I mean, if you want to do it now, go ahead.

segments.speaker: LUKAS
segments.text: I think it shouldn't take more than an hour or two to just add a button that records.

We can also. Should probably just be able to update otherwise to take a small segment of what we have been saying to confirm who's talking and then assign that segment to a specific speaker. And that will then clarify the cluster name instead of speaker 01 or 02.
segments.speaker: MARTEN
